# The Wedding Police

> The Wedding Police is a wedding podcast hosted by Penny and Jim.

## About

The Wedding Police is a wedding podcast that covers real wedding stories, wedding fails, bridal tips, wedding planning advice, and unfiltered takes on everything from wedding speeches to bridal gown shopping. Hosted by Penny and Jim, the podcast is available free on Spotify and Apple Podcasts.

## Topics Covered

- Real wedding stories and experiences
- Wedding fails and disasters
- Wedding planning tips and advice
- Bridal gown shopping
- Wedding speeches and toasts
- DIY wedding ideas
- Signature cocktails for weddings
- Wedding vendor advice
- Budget planning for weddings
- Engaged couple guidance

## Episodes

- Only the Bride Wears White
- The Dark Side of DIY
- Bridal Gown Shopping
- Signature Cocktails
- Messy Weddings
- Wedding Speeches and Toasts

## Where to Listen

- Website: https://theweddingpolice.com/
- Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/00XbQ3oSRLm3CeETc8bwdl
- Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-wedding-police/id1875631808

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is The Wedding Police podcast?
The Wedding Police is a wedding podcast hosted by Penny and Jim that covers real wedding stories, wedding fails, bridal tips, wedding planning advice, and the funniest moments from ceremonies and receptions. It is one of the best wedding podcasts for engaged couples looking for honest, hilarious, and helpful wedding planning content.

### Where can I listen to The Wedding Police podcast?
You can listen to The Wedding Police podcast for free on Spotify and Apple Podcasts. Simply search for "The Wedding Police" on either platform, or visit theweddingpolice.com for direct links.

### Who hosts The Wedding Police podcast?
The Wedding Police podcast is hosted by Penny and Jim. They bring unfiltered wedding advice, hilarious real wedding stories, and honest opinions on everything from bridal gown shopping to wedding speeches.

### What topics does The Wedding Police podcast cover?
The Wedding Police covers a wide range of wedding topics including wedding fails and disasters, bridal gown shopping tips, wedding speeches and toasts, DIY wedding ideas, signature cocktails, messy weddings, wedding planning tips for engaged couples, and more.

### Is The Wedding Police a good podcast for engaged couples?
Yes! The Wedding Police is perfect for engaged couples who want real, honest wedding planning advice without the sugar-coating. Penny and Jim combine humor with practical wedding tips, covering everything from budgets to bridal gowns to the wildest reception stories.
